task: What is the ownership cost of the first car in the list "top buys"?
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to Parkers’ Top Buys page (https://www.parkers.co.uk/best-cars/top-buys/) and extracted the ownership cost shown for the first car listed on that page. The fetched page content explicitly shows the first car as Renault 4 E-Tech Electric with “Ownership cost 4.0,” which matches the agent’s final answer. Although there was some internal ambiguity about Renault 5 later in the list, the final answer corresponds to the first car actually displayed on the Top Buys page.
final_result_response: The ownership cost is **4.0 out of 5** for the first car shown, the **Renault 4 E-Tech Electric**. <citation refs="fetch_call_9G9MtdRHtj5BnixKQm95bJ9e|fc_071ea7e6714b9bda016a05090129a88199bc8c5bd79027bef8#1">“Renault 4 E-Tech Electric” ... “Ownership cost” ... “4.0”</citation>
action_history: Opening Parkers website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.parkers.co.uk/');
Opening first car ratings: await page.locator('e29').click();
